ModMetaData.name: Eternal
ModMetaData.author: 0Shard
ModMetaData.description:
Eternal introduces true biological immortality to RimWorld. Pawns with the Eternal trait can recover from death through a multi-phase resurrection process, regrowing missing body parts and healing all injuries over time.
Features: - Resurrect dead Eternal pawns via a gizmo on their corpse - 4-phase body part regrowth (Initial Formation → Tissue Development → Nerve Integration → Functional Completion) - Resource-based balance through nutrition debt - Corpse preservation, caravan support, and map protection - Accelerated injury and scar healing for living Eternals - Fully configurable healing rates, nutrition costs, and per-hediff behavior - Odyssey DLC compatibility
Requires: Harmony (load before Eternal)
